sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86904" key="proglwssi/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προγλωσσίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n86904.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tip of the tongue,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:105" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.105</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
